title: ADR-0006: Orchestrator execution seat — operator workstation
verdict_summary: Canonical decision-record ADR (ratified 2026-07-07, amended same day) that resolves the Act-1 open decisions about WHERE the delivery orchestrator and its build/review sub-agents run and HOW they are credentialed. It is a governance/process artifact about the delivery-program's own execution seat — not a spec of Orvex Studio product surfaces. Every 'decision' it records either (a) ratifies the already-proven laptop seat (zero new infra), (b) settles the credential model as operator-local harness-mediated auth with the later amendment WITHDRAWING the hard refuse-gate, (c) fixes persistence to git + GitHub, or (d) explicitly KEEPS the already-scaffolded crew DEPLOY overlays. All named components/artifacts already exist on disk (verified: deploy/kustomize/components/crew/, orvex-studio-mcp crew-applicationset.yaml + crew-component/, tools/act3/ engine files). No un-id'd MUST mandates NEW product build work; the credential MUST (refuse-dispatch-on-raw-key) was itself withdrawn by the amendment. All future/multi-operator/claim-arbiter items are explicitly deferred ("open, not decided here"). Zero build gaps.

components.name: orvex-studio-mcp/deploy/argocd/crew-applicationset.yaml
components.quote: an ArgoCD `ApplicationSet` whose `scmProvider` generator watches `orvexai/orvex-studio-mcp` for `^crew/.+` branches and mints one Application per crew branch — EXISTS (scaffolded, ADR says 'Keep')

components.name: orvex-studio-mcp/deploy/kustomize/crew-component/
components.quote: the shared per-dev deploy manifests: Recreate-strategy Deployment running the Tekton-built crew-dev:crew image — EXISTS (scaffolded)

components.name: orvex-studio-mcp/deploy/kustomize/crew-env/
components.quote: path `deploy/kustomize/crew-env` rendered from `dev` by the ApplicationSet — EXISTS (scaffolded)

components.name: orvex-wiki/deploy/kustomize/components/crew/
components.quote: the wiki-side crew `Component`: a full parallel per-crew stack (own Postgres/Redis), `wiki.crew-{name}.orvex.dev` — EXISTS (scaffolded)

components.name: tools/act3/ delivery-engine + resume assets
components.quote: Engine files live in-repo (`tools/act3/` or equivalent): the delivery-engine Workflow script, resume assets, README, and wiki mirror — EXISTS (delivery-engine.js, README.md, po-decisions present)
